episode.working_title: I Built the Local Rig and Benchmarked It vs the Cloud

snapshot.note: Fair fight: Ollama llama3.2:3b LOCAL (8GB Mac) vs the same model on a free Google Colab Tesla T4 -- throughput + latency MEASURED on both. Cost callback: local (hardware + measured-throughput electricity) vs managed API rent (Sonnet-class, claude-sonnet-4-6) at 150,000,000 tok/mo -- the managed side is a PRICE MODEL (rate VERIFIED Jun 2026), not a live call. Cloud GPU $/1M is MODELED at a $0.35/hr T4 rental rate; the T4 throughput was measured free on Colab.

topic: Local rig vs cloud GPU (same model), plus the cost vs managed API

eyebrow: DATA_MEASURED // LOCAL 8GB MAC vs CLOUD T4
integrity_notes: tokens/sec + latency (LOCAL and CLOUD_VM) are MEASURED via Ollama telemetry, same model both sides; LOCAL on an 8GB Mac, CLOUD on a free Google Colab Tesla T4.

local $/1M is MODELED electricity at 30.0W / $0.17/kWh; cloud_vm $/1M is MODELED at the T4 rental rate ($0.35/hr, VERIFIED Jun 2026: RunPod ~$0.40/hr) divided by its MEASURED throughput (the Colab T4 was free).

cloud latency is the WARM mean of 14 calls; the one-time ~92s cold-start model-load call (first of 15) is excluded. Local Mac was already warm, so both are warm-state. Cloud 70.9 tok/s REPRODUCED last night's 71.5 (two independent Colab T4 runs).

cost_compare managed line is a PRICE MODEL: $4.0/1M blended x 150M tok/mo = $7,200/yr. VERIFIED: this = a Sonnet-class API (claude-sonnet-4-6 @ $3/$15 per 1M in/out) on an input-heavy agent mix (~10:1) -> ~$4.1/1M. The cheapest model (claude-haiku-4-5 @ $1/$5) at the same mix is ~$1.4/1M (~$2,500/yr); $4/1M is therefore a Sonnet-class, conservative figure.
hardware is one-time and shown as the flat base of the local line, never folded into per-token $.
sources_to_cite: Anthropic pricing (verified 2026-04-29): claude-sonnet-4-6 $3 / $15 per 1M (in/out); claude-haiku-4-5 $1 / $5. The $4/1M blend = a Sonnet-class, input-heavy coding agent.
T4 rental $0.35/hr (MODELED; verified Jun 2026: RunPod T4 ~$0.40/hr, market $0.13-0.60/hr). Throughput measured FREE on a Google Colab Tesla T4.
measurement hosts: LOCAL macOS-26.3.2-arm64 ; CLOUD Google Colab NVIDIA Tesla T4
